'''âk-sh-zh-p''' ('''kakashzhepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:gym|gym]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-sh-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gym|gym]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-sh-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kakashzhepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikashzhepoko|thikashzhepoko]] || [[word:jikashzhepoko|jikashzhepoko]] || [[word:shikashzhepoko|shikashzhepoko]] || [[word:kikashzhepoko|kikashzhepoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
